summary: Records that the unsupported `.gemini/`, `.pi/`, and root-level local Prometheus/Grafana/OTel stack artifacts targeted by the cleanup plan are already absent in the stacked checkout, while explicitly preserving current product observability code, docs, specs, and migrations.

claims.statement: The cleanup series removes only revalidated dead or unsupported repo artifacts while preserving currently authoritative assets such as `.agents/`, `FileSystemStorage`, and live product observability surfaces.
claims.evidence_description: Validation found the unsupported runtime artifact paths already absent and records that current `src/observability`, `src/otel`, web observability docs/specs, and Supabase OTel migrations are preserved as live product surfaces.

claims.statement: Repo docs and cleanup governance artifacts explicitly record accepted cleanup decisions, validation evidence, and deferred items so later sessions can continue without re-auditing the same scope.
claims.evidence_description: The tracker records the unsupported-runtime validation outcome and the boundary between absent local stack artifacts and preserved product observability surfaces.
